description_long: This is a large, multi-wing school complex set on a rectangular green plot, featuring several interconnected white buildings with flat roofs and numerous windows. The main structure is centrally located, with two detached auxiliary buildings positioned to one side, likely serving as gymnasiums or administrative offices. A prominent parking lot filled with cars is situated along one edge, indicating ample capacity for staff and visitors. The school grounds include paved walkways and small landscaped areas, with visible entryways and service doors distributed around the buildings. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on accessibility and utility. The layout suggests a suburban or urban educational facility designed to accommodate a significant number of students and staff.
description: A large, modern school complex with multiple white buildings, flat roofs, and a spacious parking lot, set on a green rectangular plot.
description_view_0: The main school building is seen from the front, with the parking lot and several cars visible in the background and two auxiliary buildings to the right.
description_view_1: This rear view highlights the two detached buildings in the foreground, with the main school complex and parking lot further back.
description_view_2: From this side, the parking lot is prominent in the foreground, with the main school building and its various wings extending behind it.
description_view_3: The view shows the parking lot to the left, the main school building in the center, and the auxiliary buildings in the background.
